# Sword of the Aquatic God
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Sword%20of%20the%20Aquatic%20God&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Sword of the Aquatic God
| slot = sword
| tier = UT
| rarity = u
| desc = A Sword of the Aquatic God, Thanks to: Neva.

| rof = 115
| range = 
| projSpeed = 10
|
| minDmg = 165
| maxDmg = 230
| feedp = 490
| fameb = 6

| bonuses = {{Stat|wis|5}}

|lootbag = white
|dropsFrom = can be found in White Bags dropped by: [[Thessal the Mermaid Goddess]].|range2 = 4.8}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Swords]]
{{NavSwords}}
</noinclude>
